speaker: speaker1
text: Helen , did you hear I ’ m having a party ? Next Saturday in my place .

speaker: speaker2
text: I may have something on that day , but thanks for inviting me .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , drop by if you can .

speaker: speaker2
text: I will , do you want me to bring anything ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No , just bring yourself . I hope to see you there .
